problem: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown
mechanism: Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue
hypothesis: If Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue is applied to universe, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
